title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta, founder at Replit, discusses his decade-long mission to democratize software development through agentic AI. Replit partnered with Anthropic's Claude for coding capabilities in early 2024, enabling over 40 million users to build software using natural language without coding experience.
